title: Supplemental data of the Global Carbon Project 2025: National Fossil Carbon Emissions 2025 v1.0

licence.attribution: Global Carbon Project (2025), Supplemental data of Global Carbon Budget 2025, version 1.0, https://doi.org/10.18160/GCP-2025. Changes and unit conversions by Earth Love United are identified.

includes: cement carbonation uptake as a sink in E_FOS
excludes: international aviation and maritime bunkers from national values

source_note: The source states that national values exclude bunker fuels while world totals include them. Country-year uncertainty intervals are not supplied in the workbook and must not be inferred from the global uncertainty range.
